sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72958" key="o)libro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλιβρός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n72958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀλισθηρός</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
